GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "Test Bas".

redcap:Surveys.title: Form 1
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:Surveys.title: Demographics
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:Surveys.title: Social History
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:Surveys.title: Contact Info
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:Surveys.title: Phq9
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:SurveysScheduler.email_content:
Please take this survey.

You may open the survey in your web browser by clicking the link below:
[survey-link]

If the link above does not work, try copying the link below into your web browser:
[survey-url]

This link is unique to you and should not be forwarded to others.

redcap:Alerts.alert_message:
Hi,

Please complete the baseline forms:

[baseline_arm_1][survey-link:demographics:Start here]

thanks,

Study team

Hi,

Please complete the baseline forms:

[3_month_arm_1][survey-link:phq9:Start here]

thanks,

Study team

Question.TranslatedText: Is the participant 18 years of age or older?
Is the participant female (biological sex assigned at birth)?
✓ ELIGIBLE — Participant meets all inclusion criteria.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: ✓ ELIGIBLE — Participant meets all inclusion criteria.

ItemDef.Name: screen_ineligible_msg
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Participant must be 18+, female, and currently pregnant to qualify.

Question.TranslatedText: ✗ NOT ELIGIBLE — Participant does not meet all inclusion criteria. Do not enroll.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: ✗ NOT ELIGIBLE — Participant does not meet all inclusion criteria. Do not enroll.

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (4 - 42). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (4 - 42). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: What is your current smoking status?

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 10). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 10). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 100). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 100). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: How would you describe your alcohol use?
How many standard drinks per week on average?

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 100). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - 100). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Do you currently use any recreational drugs or substances (not prescribed)?
How often do you engage in physical exercise?
What types of exercise do you typically do?
OK to send text messages to this number?
Instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems? Select one answer per question.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText:
Instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?
Select one answer per question.

Question.TranslatedText: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
Feeling tired or having little energy
Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down
Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television
Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed? Or being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or thoughts of hurting yourself in some way
If you checked off any problems, how difficult have these problems made it for you to do your work, take care of things at home, or get along with other people?

ItemDef.Name: phq9_total
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Range: 0–27. Higher scores indicate greater depression severity.

Question.TranslatedText: Score guide: 0–4 Minimal • 5–9 Mild • 10–14 Moderate • 15–19 Moderately Severe • 20–27 Severe
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: Score guide: 0–4 Minimal • 5–9 Mild • 10–14 Moderate • 15–19 Moderately Severe • 20–27 Severe

ItemDef.Name: med_name
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Include generic or brand name. Pre-populated from previous visit — review and update.
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_name][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_name][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.Name: med_dose
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_dose][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_dose][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.Name: med_route
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_route][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_route][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.Name: med_frequency
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: e.g., once daily, twice daily, as needed
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_frequency][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_frequency][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.Name: med_indication
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_indication][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_indication][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.Name: med_start_date
ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_start_date][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_start_date][10]',@DEFAULT=''))))))))))

ItemDef.redcap:FieldAnnotation: @IF([current-instance]=1 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][1]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][1]',@IF([current-instance]=2 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][2]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][2]',@IF([current-instance]=3 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][3]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][3]',@IF([current-instance]=4 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][4]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][4]',@IF([current-instance]=5 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][5]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][5]',@IF([current-instance]=6 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][6]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][6]',@IF([current-instance]=7 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][7]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][7]',@IF([current-instance]=8 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][8]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][8]',@IF([current-instance]=9 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][9]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][9]',@IF([current-instance]=10 AND [previous-event-name][med_ongoing][10]<>'',@DEFAULT='[previous-event-name][med_ongoing][10]',@DEFAULT='1'))))))))))

Question.TranslatedText: Is the participant still taking this medication?

ItemDef.Name: ae_term
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Use MedDRA preferred term if available

Question.TranslatedText: Is this a Serious Adverse Event (SAE)?
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
SAE Criteria Met (select all that apply)
Has this event been reported to the IRB?

Decode.TranslatedText: Former smoker (quit more than 12 months ago)
Recent former smoker (quit 12 months ago or less)
I have drunk in the past but not in the last year

CodeList.Name: ae_sae_criteria___1
CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Death | 2, Life-threatening | 3, Requires or prolongs hospitalization | 4, Results in persistent or significant disability | 5, Congenital anomaly or birth defect | 6, Other medically important condition

CodeList.Name: ae_sae_criteria___2
CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Death | 2, Life-threatening | 3, Requires or prolongs hospitalization | 4, Results in persistent or significant disability | 5, Congenital anomaly or birth defect | 6, Other medically important condition

CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Death | 2, Life-threatening | 3, Requires or prolongs hospitalization | 4, Results in persistent or significant disability | 5, Congenital anomaly or birth defect | 6, Other medically important condition

CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Death | 2, Life-threatening | 3, Requires or prolongs hospitalization | 4, Results in persistent or significant disability | 5, Congenital anomaly or birth defect | 6, Other medically important condition

CodeList.Name: ae_sae_criteria___6
CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 1, Death | 2, Life-threatening | 3, Requires or prolongs hospitalization | 4, Results in persistent or significant disability | 5, Congenital anomaly or birth defect | 6, Other medically important condition
